name: polymer-claims
description: Legacy v1.2 harness for authoring machine-verifiable biomedical FormalClaim IR claims against the Polymer Genomics substrate (polymerbio.org). NOTE: v1.2 is frozen and does not exercise the active v1.3 runtime.

plugins.name: claim-harness
plugins.description: v1.2 / frozen-legacy — authors v1.2 FormalClaim drafts; not the v1.3 grammar/protocol runtime.
